provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content:
1. Short title
This Act may be cited as the Land Control Act.

provisions.title: Interpretation

definitions.definition: land other than tribal land or land within a township
one of the transactions specified in section 3(1) other than that specified in section 3(3)
any estate, interest or right in land
a private company within the meaning of the Companies Act (Cap. 42:01)
any person charged with the registration of dealings in land under any written law, or, in relation to shares in a company, the person keeping the register of shares in that company
a share or debenture within the meaning of the Companies Act.
